permalink

Solid ERP for fast-growing DTC brands

Sarah K., Director of Operations April 12, 2026
★★★★½
The Shopify integration is genuinely native. Bundles work without custom code, which saved us weeks of implementation time vs. our previous evaluation of NetSuite.
Reporting customization has a learning curve. The new AI-powered SQL report generation helps but newcomers will struggle for the first month.
Worth it for DTC brands doing $5M+ on Shopify. Smaller brands may find it overkill.
permalink

Multi-warehouse allocation is broken for us

Mike R., Logistics Lead April 10, 2026
★★
Customer support is responsive when issues arise.
Multi-warehouse allocation logic doesn't account for freight class on heavier SKUs. We've had to manually re-route orders for two months. Engineering ticket open since February.
permalink

Implementation was painless

Dana L., COO April 8, 2026
★★★★★
Fixed-price implementation actually held to the quote. We went live in 10 weeks. Their team was hands-on; no third-party consultants billing by the hour.
Nothing significant.
